form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th on April 8 over 520m at this track behind Nangar Onyx beaten 4 lengths (30.38) in a Grade 4/5. Placed two back at this track. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th over 400m at Mandurah beaten 16 lengths (23.47) behind My Paddy Boy in a Grade 5 on February 26. Placed two back at Mandurah. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.
